title: Cirrus: Update to Fedora 32 proper
body:
Now that it's officially released, update to it from the beta.  Also
(and significant), adjust the SELinux context of the GCP metadata
service.  Add a comment to the code explaining why this is necessary.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude @mheon PTAL, this is ready to go and only a small change.  These new Fedora images (including in_podman) are also used by https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1971

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude*, *cevich* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
